meta.title: ReviewNudge launches July 15
meta.description: ReviewNudge launches July 15. A simple way for local businesses to manage review requests, follow-ups, and customer feedback in one organized workspace.

hero.title: ReviewNudge launches July 15.
hero.body: A simple way for local businesses to manage review requests, follow-ups, and customer feedback in one organized workspace.
hero.offerStrong: One clear place for customer review activity.
hero.offerBody: Review links, follow-ups, customer status, and team visibility without turning review management into a marketing-platform project.

launch.title: July 15, 2026
launch.body: ReviewNudge will be available beginning July 15. Come back on launch day to start organizing review requests in one clean workspace.
launch.messageItem2: Local service teams can start organizing review requests and follow-ups.
launch.messageItem3: The coming-soon page gives way to the live product entry point.

updates.label: What's coming
updates.step1Body: Send review requests from a clean workspace when the customer experience is still fresh.
updates.step2Body: See which customers have been contacted, which requests need attention, and what follow-up is next.
updates.step3Body: Build a more consistent review process without adding complexity to the day.

preview.title: A cleaner way to manage review requests.
preview.body: ReviewNudge is built around one simple workspace for review links, customer status, follow-ups, and team visibility.
preview.reminderBody: Keep the follow-up moving without losing track.

footer.launch: © 2026 Et al Solutions LLC. ReviewNudge™ and Portmason™ are marks of Et al Solutions LLC.
